creator: fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
text:
On Fri, Dec 25, 2009 at 6:00 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of textproc/p5-Text-Markdown,
>
> Please note that PR ports/142002 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/142002
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Approved, Thanks!

--=20
fernan
